---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Teaching Experience

**Tutorial Assistant — Mathematics for Economists**
Department of Economics, KNUST *(Nov 2023 – Aug 2024)*

- Led weekly tutorial sessions for undergraduate students.
- Supported assessment through grading and individualised feedback.
- Coordinated weekly departmental research seminars.

**High School Economics Teacher (part-time)**
One Time Educational Consult, Kumasi *(Aug 2023 – Jul 2024)*

- Taught Senior High Level Economics.
- Designed customised lesson plans tailored to students' learning needs.
- Monitored student progress through regular assessments and adjusted teaching strategies accordingly.

## Mentoring

- **UST Info Hub Facilitator** *(2022/2023)* — advised 200+ prospective students on university applications.
- **Literacy Impact Programme Mentor** *(Apr – Dec 2023)* — led literacy tutorials for basic-school pupils in Kumasi.
